Applicability of Amendment to Annual Report Requirements, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–263, div. A, title XII, § 1202(e)136 Stat. 2826Dec. 23, 2022“With respect to a report that was required to be submitted under , United States Code, prior to the date of the enactment of this Act [], that has not been submitted as of such date and relates to a year preceding fiscal year 2023, such a report may be submitted in accordance with—section 386 of title 10Dec. 23, 2022“(1)the requirements of such section 386 as amended by subsection (d); or“(2)the requirements of such section 386 as in effect on the day before the date of the enactment of this Act.”

children.heading: .—Annual Report Required
children.label: a .—Annual Report Required
children.text: Not later than March 31 of each year, the Secretary of Defense shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that sets forth, on a country-by-country basis, an overview of security cooperation activities carried out by the Department of Defense during the fiscal year in which such report is submitted, using the authorities specified in subsection (b).

children.label: A
children.text: a brief overview of the primary security cooperation objectives for the activities encompassed by the report; and

children.label: B
children.text: a description of how such activities advance the theater security cooperation strategy of the relevant geographic combatant command.

children.label: A
children.text: With respect to , the value of all logistic support, supplies, and services for which notice is required by such section.section 331 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the Department of Defense cost to provide any Department personnel as advisors to a ministry of defense.section 332(a) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the Department of Defense incremental execution costs to conduct activities under such section.section 332(b) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: With respect to , the value of all programs for which notice is required by such section.section 333 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: With respect to , the total Department of Defense costs to fund expenses to attend training provided by the Government of Colombia that began during the period of the report.section 335 of this title

children.label: F
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the Department of Defense manpower and travel costs to conduct bilateral state partnership program engagements with the partner country.section 341 of this title

children.label: G
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the Department of Defense-funded, foreign-partner travel costs to attend a regional center activity that began during the period of the report.section 342 of this title

children.label: H
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the estimated Department of Defense execution cost to complete all training that began during the period of the report.section 345 of this title

children.label: I
children.text: With respect to amounts made available for , the planned execution cost of completing humanitarian assistance activities for the partner country that were approved for the period of the report.section 2561 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Pursuant to , the number of personnel from a partner country assigned to a Department of Defense organization.section 311 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The number of new programs carried out during the period of the report that required notice under .section 331 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: Pursuant to , the number of Department of Defense personnel assigned as advisors to a ministry of defense.section 332(a) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: Pursuant to , the number of activities conducted by the Department of Defense.section 332(b) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: The number of new programs carried out during the period of the report that required notice under .section 333 of this title

children.label: F
children.text: With respect to , the number of partner country officials who participated in training provided by the Government of Colombia that began during the period of the report.section 335 of this title

children.label: G
children.text: With respect to , the number of Department of Defense bilateral state partnership program engagements with the partner country that began during the period of the report.section 341 of this title

children.label: H
children.text: With respect to , the number of partner country officials who participated in regional center activity that began during the period of the report.section 342 of this title

children.label: I
children.text: Pursuant to the authorities under sections 343, 345, 348, 349, 350 and 352 of this title, the total number of partner country personnel who began training during the period of the report.

children.label: J
children.text: Pursuant to , the number of cadets from the partner country that were enrolled in the Service Academies during the period of the report.section 347 of this title

children.label: K
children.text: Pursuant to amounts made available to carry out , the number of new humanitarian assistance projects funded through the Overseas Humanitarian Disaster and Civic Aid account that were approved during the period of the required report.section 2561 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: whether the person is a member of the armed forces or a civilian;

children.label: ii
children.text: the rank of the person (if applicable); and

children.label: iii
children.text: the component of the Department of Defense and location to which such person is assigned.

children.label: B
children.text: With respect to each civilian employee of the Department of Defense or member of the armed forces that was assigned, pursuant to , as an advisor to a ministry of defense during the period of the report, a description of the object of the Department of Defense for such support and the name of the ministry or regional organization to which the employee or member was assigned.section 332(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the name of the supported ministry or regional organization;

children.label: ii
children.text: the component of the Department of Defense that conducted the activity;

children.label: iii
children.text: the duration of the activity; and

children.label: iv
children.text: a description of the objective of the activity.

children.label: i
children.text: the units of the national security forces of the foreign country to which assistance was provided;

children.label: ii
children.text: the type of operation capability assisted;

children.label: iii
children.text: a description of the nature of the assistance being provided; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the estimated cost included in the notice provided for such assistance.

children.label: i
children.text: the units of the defense personnel of the friendly foreign country to which the Department of Defense funded assistance was provided;

children.label: ii
children.text: the units of the Government of Colombia that conducted the training activity;

children.label: iii
children.text: the duration of the training activity provided by the Government of Colombia; and

children.label: iv
children.text: a description of the objective of the training activity provided by the Government of Colombia.

children.label: i
children.text: a description of the activity;

children.label: ii
children.text: the duration of the activity;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of participating members of the National Guard; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of participating personnel of foreign country.

children.label: i
children.text: a description of the activity;

children.label: ii
children.text: the name of the Regional Center that sponsored the activity;

children.label: iii
children.text: the location and duration of the training; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of officials from the foreign country who participated the activity.

children.label: i
children.text: a description of the training;

children.label: ii
children.text: the location and duration of the training; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of personnel of the foreign country trained.

children.label: i
children.text: the title of the project;

children.label: ii
children.text: a description of the assistance to be provided; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the anticipated costs to provide such assistance.
